svg.title: LeNet-5 Architecture with CIM Execution Mapping
svg.desc: Horizontal IEEE-style diagram of LeNet-5 layers (top) with CIM hardware/software execution badges and cycle counts (bottom), fusion zone and weight packing annotations.
svg.text: LeNet-5 Architecture with CIM Execution Mapping
Cycle counts from inference profiling (Table 4-5). FC3–FC5 share on-chip buffer; no DRAM access between fused layers.
